fields.name: START
fields.description: Start This bit can be used to launch the DMA2D according to parameters loaded in the various configuration registers. This bit is automatically reset by the following events: at the end of the transfer when the data transfer is aborted by the user by setting ABORT in this register when a data transfer error occurs when the data transfer has not started due to a configuration error, or another transfer operation already ongoing (automatic CLUT loading)

fields.name: SUSP
fields.description: Suspend This bit can be used to suspend the current transfer. This bit is set and reset by software. It is automatically reset by hardware when START = 0.

fields.name: ABORT
fields.description: Abort This bit can be used to abort the current transfer. This bit is set by software, and is automatically reset by hardware when START = 0.

fields.name: LOM
fields.description: Line offset mode This bit configures how the line offset is expressed (pixels or bytes) for the foreground, background and output. This bit is set and cleared by software. It can not be modified while a transfer is ongoing.

fields.name: TEIE
fields.description: Transfer error (TE) interrupt enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: TCIE
fields.description: Transfer complete (TC) interrupt enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: TWIE
fields.description: Transfer watermark (TW) interrupt enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: CAEIE
fields.description: CLUT access error (CAE) interrupt enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: CTCIE
fields.description: CLUT transfer complete (CTC) interrupt enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: CEIE
fields.description: Configuration error (CE) interrupt enable This bit is set and cleared by software.

fields.name: MODE
fields.description: DMA2D mode This bit is set and cleared by software. It cannot be modified while a transfer is ongoing. Others: Reserved

fields.name: TEIF
fields.description: Transfer error interrupt flag This bit is set when an error occurs during a DMA transfer (data transfer or automatic CLUT loading).

fields.name: TCIF
fields.description: Transfer complete interrupt flag This bit is set when a DMA2D transfer operation is complete (data transfer only).

fields.name: TWIF
fields.description: Transfer watermark interrupt flag This bit is set when the last pixel of the watermarked line has been transferred.

fields.name: CAEIF
fields.description: CLUT access error interrupt flag This bit is set when the CPU accesses the CLUT while the CLUT is being automatically copied from a system memory to the internal DMA2D.

fields.name: CTCIF
fields.description: CLUT transfer complete interrupt flag This bit is set when the CLUT copy from a system memory area to the internal DMA2D memory is complete.

fields.name: CEIF
fields.description: Configuration error interrupt flag This bit is set when START is set in DMA2D_CR, DMA2DFGPFCCR or DMA2D_BGPFCCR, and a wrong configuration has been programmed.

fields.name: CTEIF
fields.description: Clear transfer error interrupt flag Programming this bit to 1 clears the TEIF flag in DMA2D_ISR.

fields.name: CTCIF
fields.description: Clear transfer complete interrupt flag Programming this bit to 1 clears the TCIF flag in DMA2D_ISR.

fields.name: CTWIF
fields.description: Clear transfer watermark interrupt flag Programming this bit to 1 clears the TWIF flag in DMA2D_ISR.

fields.name: CAECIF
fields.description: Clear CLUT access error interrupt flag Programming this bit to 1 clears the CAEIF flag in DMA2D_ISR.

fields.name: CCTCIF
fields.description: Clear CLUT transfer complete interrupt flag Programming this bit to 1 clears the CTCIF flag in DMA2D_ISR.

fields.name: CCEIF
fields.description: Clear configuration error interrupt flag Programming this bit to 1 clears the CEIF flag in DMA2D_ISR.

fields.name: MA
fields.description: Memory address, address of the data used for the foreground image The address alignment must match the image format selected: a 32-bit per pixel format must be 32-bit aligned, a 16-bit per pixel format must be 16-bit aligned, and a 4-bit per pixel format must be 8-bit aligned.

fields.name: LO
fields.description: Line offset This field gives the line offset used for the foreground image, expressed: in pixels when LOM = 0 in DMA2D_CR. Only LO[13:0] bits are considered, LO[15:14] bits are ignored. in bytes when LOM = 1 This value is used for the address generation. It is added at the end of each line to determine the starting address of the next line. If the image format is 4-bit per pixel, the line offset must be even.

fields.name: MA
fields.description: Memory address, address of the data used for the background image The address alignment must match the image format selected: a 32-bit per pixel format must be 32-bit aligned, a 16-bit per pixel format must be 16-bit aligned and a 4-bit per pixel format must be 8-bit aligned.

fields.name: LO
fields.description: Line offset This field gives the line offset used for the background image, expressed: in pixels when LOM = 0 in DMA2D_CR. Only LO[13:0] bits are considered, LO[15:14] bits are ignored. in bytes when LOM = 1 This value is used for the address generation. It is added at the end of each line to determine the starting address of the next line. If the image format is 4-bit per pixel, the line offset must be even.

fields.name: CM
fields.description: Color mode These bits defines the color format of the foreground image. Others: Reserved

fields.name: CCM
fields.description: CLUT color mode This bit defines the color format of the CLUT.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Start This bit can be set to start the automatic loading of the CLUT. It is automatically reset: at the end of the transfer when the transfer is aborted by the user by setting ABORT in DMA2D_CR when a transfer error occurs when the transfer has not started due to a configuration error or another transfer operation already ongoing (data transfer or automatic background CLUT transfer)

fields.name: CS
fields.description: CLUT size These bits define the size of the CLUT used for the foreground image. The number of CLUT entries is equal to CS[7:0] + 1.

fields.name: AM
fields.description: Alpha mode These bits select the alpha channel value to be used for the foreground image. Others: Reserved

fields.name: CSS
fields.description: Chroma subsampling These bits define the chroma subsampling mode for YCbCr color mode. Others: Reserved

fields.name: AI
fields.description: Alpha inverted This bit inverts the alpha value.

fields.name: RBS
fields.description: Red/Blue swap This bit allows to swap Red and Blue to support BGR or ABGR color formats.

fields.name: ALPHA
fields.description: Alpha value These bits define a fixed alpha channel value which can replace the original alpha value, or be multiplied by the original alpha value, according to the alpha mode selected through AM[1:0] in this register.

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue value for the A4 or A8 mode of the foreground image Used also for fixed color FG in memory-to-memory mode with blending and fixed color FG (BG fetch only with FG and BG PFC active).

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green value for the A4 or A8 mode of the foreground image Used also for fixed color FG in memory-to-memory mode with blending and fixed color FG (BG fetch only with FG and BG PFC active).

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red value for the A4 or A8 mode of the foreground image Used also for fixed color FG in memory-to-memory mode with blending and fixed color FG (BG fetch only with FG and BG PFC active).

fields.name: CM
fields.description: Color mode These bits define the color format of the foreground image. Others: Reserved

fields.name: CCM
fields.description: CLUT color mode These bits define the color format of the CLUT.

fields.name: START
fields.description: Start This bit is set to start the automatic loading of the CLUT. This bit is automatically reset: at the end of the transfer when the transfer is aborted by the user by setting ABORT bit in DMA2D_CR when a transfer error occurs when the transfer has not started due to a configuration error or another transfer operation already on going (data transfer or automatic background CLUT transfer)

fields.name: CS
fields.description: CLUT size These bits define the size of the CLUT used for the BG. The number of CLUT entries is equal to CS[7:0] + 1.

fields.name: AM
fields.description: Alpha mode These bits define which alpha channel value to be used for the background image. Others: Reserved

fields.name: AI
fields.description: Alpha Inverted This bit inverts the alpha value.

fields.name: RBS
fields.description: Red/Blue swap This bit allows to swap Red and Blue to support BGR or ABGR color formats.

fields.name: ALPHA
fields.description: Alpha value These bits define a fixed alpha channel value which can replace the original alpha value, or be multiplied with the original alpha value according to the alpha mode selected with AM[1:0].

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue value for the A4 or A8 mode of the background Used also for fixed color BG in memory-to-memory mode with blending and fixed color BG (FG fetch only with FG and BG PFC active).

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green value for the A4 or A8 mode of the background Used also for fixed color BG in memory-to-memory mode with blending and fixed color BG (FG fetch only with FG and BG PFC active).

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red value for the A4 or A8 mode of the background Used also for fixed color BG in memory-to-memory mode with blending and fixed color BG (FG fetch only with FG and BG PFC active).

registers.name: FGCMAR
registers.description: DMA2D foreground CLUT memory address register

fields.name: MA
fields.description: Memory address Address of the data used for the CLUT address dedicated to the foreground image. If the foreground CLUT format is 32-bit, the address must be 32-bit aligned.

registers.name: BGCMAR
registers.description: DMA2D background CLUT memory address register

fields.name: MA
fields.description: Memory address Address of the data used for the CLUT address dedicated to the background image. If the background CLUT format is 32-bit, the address must be 32-bit aligned.

fields.name: CM
fields.description: Color mode These bits define the color format of the output image. Others: Reserved

fields.name: SB
fields.description: Swap bytes When this bit is set, the bytes in the output FIFO are swapped two by two. The number of pixels per line (PL) must be even, and the output memory address (OMAR) must be even.

fields.name: AI
fields.description: Alpha Inverted This bit inverts the alpha value.

fields.name: RBS
fields.description: Red/Blue swap This bit allows to swap Red and Blue to support BGR or ABGR color formats.

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue value of the output image in ARGB8888 or RGB888

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green value of the output image in ARGB8888 or RGB888

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red value of the output image in ARGB8888 or RGB888 mode

fields.name: ALPHA
fields.description: Alpha channel value of the output color in ARGB8888 mode (otherwise reserved)

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue value of the output image in RGB565 mode

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green value of the output image in RGB565 mode

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red value of the output image in RGB565 mode

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue value of the output image in ARGB1555 mode

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green value of the output image in ARGB1555 mode

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red value of the output image in ARGB1555 mode

fields.name: A
fields.description: Alpha channel value of the output color in ARGB1555 mode

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue value of the output image in ARGB4444 mode

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green value of the output image in ARGB4444 mode

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red value of the output image in ARGB4444 mode

fields.name: ALPHA
fields.description: Alpha channel of the output color value in ARGB4444

fields.name: MA
fields.description: Memory address Address of the data used for the output FIFO. The address alignment must match the image format selected: a 32-bit per pixel format must be 32-bit aligned and a 16-bit per pixel format must be 16-bit aligned.

fields.name: LO
fields.description: Line offset This field gives the line offset used for the output, expressed: in pixels when LOM = 0 in DMA2D_CR. Only LO[13:0] bits are considered, LO[15:14] bits are ignored. in bytes when LOM = 1 This value is used for the address generation. It is added at the end of each line to determine the starting address of the next line.

fields.name: NL
fields.description: Number of lines of the area to be transferred.

fields.name: PL
fields.description: Pixel per lines per lines of the area to be transferred If any of the input image format is 4-bit per pixel, pixel per lines must be even.

fields.name: LW
fields.description: Line watermark for interrupt generation An interrupt is raised when the last pixel of the watermarked line has been transferred.

registers.name: AMTCR
registers.description: DMA2D AXI master timer configuration register

fields.name: EN
fields.description: Dead-time functionality enable

fields.name: DT
fields.description: Dead time Dead time value in the AXI clock cycle inserted between two consecutive accesses on the AXI master port. These bits represent the minimum guaranteed number of cycles between two consecutive AXI accesses.

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue Blue value for index 0 for the foreground

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green Green value for index 0 for the foreground

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red Red value for index 0 for the foreground

fields.name: ALPHA
fields.description: Alpha Alpha value for index 0 for the foreground

fields.name: BLUE
fields.description: Blue Blue value for index 0 for the background

fields.name: GREEN
fields.description: Green Green value for index 0 for the background

fields.name: RED
fields.description: Red Red value for index 0 for the background

fields.name: ALPHA
fields.description: Alpha Alpha value for index 0 for the background
